race.comment: MIDNIGHT DRIFTER (4) dominated first-up at the Sunshine Coast then found a Class 6 in a metro race here too rich last start. Has never been in the money second-up so that miss is not alarming. Has a strong record at 1400m, drops in grade, and will be rock-hard fit at the third run back. NODACHI (5) is a new arrival in the Tony Gollan stable. Form this prep in Victoria has been underwhelming. Freshened up and back in grade so a far better run looks on the cards. LADY SHOTGUN (3) settled well back and failed to make an impression at her latest appearance over 1200m at Doomben. Finds an easier race this evening and will appreciate the extra 200m. Goes well here so plenty to like about her prospects. FRENCH ENDEAVOUR (2) closed well to finish fourth last start over 1350m at Doomben. Open to further improvement with the blinkers reapplied. PRIME ASSET (6) returned in good style here last time out and the second-up record is far better.
